description.fr: Passe TdrDelay de 2 à 10 secondes. Donne plus de marge avant que Windows ne réinitialise le pilote GPU (écran noir « Le pilote a cessé de répondre »), surtout utile en overclocking.
description.en: Raises TdrDelay from 2 to 10 seconds. Gives more headroom before Windows resets the GPU driver (the black-screen 'display driver stopped responding'), useful under overclocking.

expectedImpact: Moins de resets pilote / écrans noirs en OC

description.fr: Désactive le service NvTelemetryContainer et les tâches planifiées de remontée NVIDIA (NvTmRep, NvProfileUpdater…). Aucune incidence sur les performances graphiques.
description.en: Disables the NvTelemetryContainer service and NVIDIA reporting scheduled tasks (NvTmRep, NvProfileUpdater…). No impact on graphics performance.

description.fr: Force PowerMizer en mode performances maximales via le registre du pilote NVIDIA. Évite les chutes de fréquence GPU intempestives (downclock) qui causent du stutter et des 1% low en baisse.
description.en: Forces PowerMizer to maximum-performance mode via the NVIDIA driver registry. Prevents spurious GPU downclocking that causes stutter and lower 1% lows.

expectedImpact: Fréquence GPU plus stable, 1% low améliorés

warnings.fr: Le GPU restera à fréquence élevée plus souvent (légèrement plus de conso/chaleur au repos).

operations.script: Get-ChildItem 'HKLM:\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Class\{4d36e968-e325-11ce-bfc1-08002be10318}' | Where-Object { $_.PSChildName -match '^[0-9]{4}$' } | ForEach-Object { $p = $_.PSPath; $d = (Get-ItemProperty -Path $p -Name DriverDesc -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).DriverDesc; if ($d -match 'NVIDIA') { New-ItemProperty -Path $p -Name 'PowerMizerEnable' -Value 1 -PropertyType DWord -Force | Out-Null; New-ItemProperty -Path $p -Name 'PerfLevelSrc' -Value 8738 -PropertyType DWord -Force | Out-Null; New-ItemProperty -Path $p -Name 'PowerMizerLevel' -Value 1 -PropertyType DWord -Force | Out-Null; New-ItemProperty -Path $p -Name 'PowerMizerLevelAC' -Value 1 -PropertyType DWord -Force | Out-Null } }
operations.revertScript: Get-ChildItem 'HKLM:\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Class\{4d36e968-e325-11ce-bfc1-08002be10318}' | Where-Object { $_.PSChildName -match '^[0-9]{4}$' } | ForEach-Object { $p = $_.PSPath; $d = (Get-ItemProperty -Path $p -Name DriverDesc -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).DriverDesc; if ($d -match 'NVIDIA') { 'PowerMizerEnable','PerfLevelSrc','PowerMizerLevel','PowerMizerLevelAC' | ForEach-Object { Remove-ItemProperty -Path $p -Name $_ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } } }

description.fr: Désactive ULPS (Ultra Low Power State) sur les GPU Radeon. ULPS peut provoquer du micro-stutter et des réveils de fréquence lents. Le désactiver stabilise les clocks (au prix d'un repos légèrement plus consommateur).
description.en: Disables ULPS (Ultra Low Power State) on Radeon GPUs. ULPS can cause micro-stutter and slow clock wake-ups. Disabling it stabilises clocks (at a slightly higher idle draw).

expectedImpact: Clocks GPU plus stables, moins de micro-stutter

operations.script: Get-ChildItem 'HKLM:\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Class\{4d36e968-e325-11ce-bfc1-08002be10318}' | Where-Object { $_.PSChildName -match '^[0-9]{4}$' } | ForEach-Object { $p = $_.PSPath; $d = (Get-ItemProperty -Path $p -Name DriverDesc -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).DriverDesc; if ($d -match 'AMD|Radeon') { Set-ItemProperty -Path $p -Name 'EnableUlps' -Value 0 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }
operations.revertScript: Get-ChildItem 'HKLM:\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Class\{4d36e968-e325-11ce-bfc1-08002be10318}' | Where-Object { $_.PSChildName -match '^[0-9]{4}$' } | ForEach-Object { $p = $_.PSPath; $d = (Get-ItemProperty -Path $p -Name DriverDesc -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).DriverDesc; if ($d -match 'AMD|Radeon') { Set-ItemProperty -Path $p -Name 'EnableUlps' -Value 1 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }
